sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n85024" key="polu/limos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πολύ-λῑμος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n85024.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">ravenous hunger,</tr_> coined as etym. of <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">βούλιμος,</foreign> prob. in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.694a</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
